observations:
Elucidat is an enterprise-focused cloud-based elearning authoring platform, now owned by Learning Pool. It offers two distinct authoring modes: 'Author' (advanced, for learning teams wanting customization, interactivity, and creative control) and 'Create' (simplified, template-led mode for subject matter experts and novice authors). Key differentiators from marketing include one-click auto-translation into 75+ languages with a glossary, multi-language SCORM packages, instant course re-release without re-uploading to LMS, and a strong collaboration/review workflow. The platform targets enterprise organizations training thousands of employees — it explicitly states it is not suited for small teams.

Pricing is entirely quote-based with no public price except for the entry 'Growth' tier starting at $1,650/user/year for 3-5 users. There is a 14-day free trial available after booking a demo. The feature matrix is well-documented on the pricing page and reveals that analytics dashboards and learner data export are add-ons on Growth and Team tiers, and only included by default on Enterprise. SSO for authors is an add-on on Growth/Team and included on Enterprise. The platform is WCAG 2.1 AA compliant, ISO 27001 certified, and GDPR compliant.

The help center confirms a full REST API (Account API, Projects API, Authors API) plus Webhooks and a xAPI/TinCan LRS API. API access appears to be gated behind the 'Scale' tier (a legacy plan name). G2 reviews (4.4/5 from 184 reviewers, rated 'Enterprise Leader' by G2) praise ease of use, templates, collaboration, and support but flag editing clunkiness, limited animation/design flexibility compared to Articulate Storyline, and occasional performance issues on large projects. No mention of Zapier/Make integrations or an MCP server was found on any public page.

rich_text.notes: [marketing] Core content type mentioned throughout; text editing is foundational to both Author and Create modes

image.notes: [marketing] Built-in Pixabay stock library; image upload supported; asset library for reuse

video_embed.notes: [marketing] YouTube and Brightcove embed via iframe explicitly listed on integrations page

video_upload.notes: [marketing] 'Audio and video embed' feature supports direct file upload; screen and camera recording built-in

audio.notes: [marketing] Audio embed supported; text-to-speech built-in on all plans

quote_callout.notes: Not explicitly mentioned in marketing or help docs; likely possible via custom page layouts but not confirmed as a named block type

accordion.notes: Not explicitly listed by name; interactive/tabbed components implied by 'interactive components' but not confirmed

tabs.notes: Not explicitly listed by name in public sources; custom page layouts and components likely support this but not confirmed

table.notes: Not mentioned in any public marketing or feature list reviewed

timeline.notes: Not mentioned in any public marketing or feature list reviewed

embed_iframe.notes: [marketing|docs] Iframe embedding explicitly listed for Brightcove, Colossyan, Synthesia, YouTube on integrations page

code_block.notes: Not mentioned; G2 review notes difficulty with math/symbols, suggesting limited code/technical formatting support

interactive_hotspot.notes: Not explicitly named in public sources; 'interactivity' is mentioned broadly but hotspot specifically not confirmed

flashcard.notes: Not mentioned by name; question pools and quiz types cover assessment but flashcard as a content type not confirmed

mcq.notes: [marketing] 'Assessments and surveys' listed on all plans; MCQ implied as core question type

true_false.notes: [marketing] Standard assessment type expected in enterprise authoring tools; listed under assessments feature

fill_blank.notes: Not explicitly named in public marketing; likely available but not confirmed

matching.notes: Not explicitly named in public marketing or feature list

drag_drop.notes: Not explicitly named; 'interactive' experiences mentioned broadly but drag-drop not confirmed

essay_open.notes: [marketing] 'Gather live feedback — let learners share written feedback through text boxes' explicitly listed on All Features page

knowledge_check_unscored.notes: [marketing] 'Interactive polling' feature listed — poll learners and display results; surveys mentioned separately from graded assessments

question_banks.notes: [marketing] 'Question pools — randomize questions from a pool so each learner sees a fresh quiz' explicitly listed on All Features page

randomisation.notes: [marketing] Question pools feature explicitly supports randomization

passing_score.notes: [marketing] 'Require a passing score — set a minimum passing score and ensure results flow to your LMS/LXP/LRS' explicitly listed

multiple_attempts.notes: Not explicitly confirmed in public sources; likely configurable but not mentioned

ai_course_generation.notes: [marketing] 'Generate using AI — provide source material and let AI quickly generate a comprehensive course' listed on All Features; 'Create using AI' included on all pricing plans; 'Elucidat Expert' AI partner announced as coming soon

ai_content_rewrite.notes: [marketing] 'Enhance with AI — automatically generate engaging introductions and concise summaries' listed on All Features page

ai_quiz_generation.notes: [marketing] AI course generation implied to include quiz generation; not confirmed as a standalone quiz-only AI feature

ai_translation.notes: [marketing] 'Auto-translate — use machine translation to convert your elearning into 75 languages' explicitly listed; includes glossary management and tone/brevity control

ai_image_generation.notes: [marketing] Not mentioned; stock library (Pixabay) is the image source, not AI generation

ai_learner_feedback.notes: [marketing] Learner feedback is gathered via text boxes and analytics; no AI-generated learner feedback mentioned

ai_tutor_chat.notes: [marketing] No AI tutor or chat-with-course feature found in public sources; 'Elucidat Expert' is an authoring AI, not a learner-facing AI tutor

scorm_12.notes: [marketing] 'Export SCORM 1.2 or SCORM 2004 packages' explicitly listed on All Features and Pricing pages

xapi_tin_can.notes: [marketing|docs] xAPI listed on pricing page as included on all plans; API docs confirm a TinCan/xAPI LRS API; 'Sync course data into your LRS' on All Features page

lti_consumer.notes: LTI not mentioned in any public source reviewed; SCORM is the primary standard used

lti_provider.notes: LTI not mentioned in any public source reviewed

pdf_export.notes: [marketing] Word export is available for offline review; no PDF export mentioned

video_export.notes: Not mentioned in any public source

completion_tracking.notes: [marketing] 'Learner trends — get a quick view of access and completion rates' listed on All Features; flows to LMS via SCORM/xAPI

quiz_score_analytics.notes: [marketing] 'Your data — access detailed learner data including completions, scores, and responses' listed on All Features

time_on_task.notes: Not explicitly mentioned; SCORM tracking would include time data but time-on-task as a specific metric not confirmed

learner_progress_view.notes: [marketing] Analytics dashboards show learner-level data; included on Enterprise tier, add-on on Growth/Team

cohort_analytics.notes: [marketing] Analytics dashboards exist; cohort-level analysis not specifically named but learner trends across audiences mentioned

analytics_dashboard.notes: [marketing] 'Analytics dashboards' listed on pricing page; included on Enterprise, add-on on Growth/Team tiers

report_export.notes: [marketing] 'Learner data export' listed on pricing page; 'Export comments to CSV' also available; Word export for course content

multi_author.notes: [marketing] Multi-author explicitly supported; 'Collaborate in one place' and team workflows are core marketing messages

inline_commenting.notes: [marketing] 'Review workflow — invite collaborators to comment directly within projects' listed; comment audit trail also available

review_approval_workflow.notes: [marketing] 'Review workflow' and 'External reviewers — invite reviewers who do not have an account to share feedback using a time-limited link' explicitly listed

version_history.notes: Project locking is listed; version history not explicitly mentioned in public sources

roles_permissions.notes: [marketing] 'Create your own roles', 'Editable user roles', 'Custom user roles', and 'Admin team dashboard' all explicitly listed; custom roles available on Team+ plans

course_templates.notes: [marketing] 'Ready-made course templates', 'Best practice templates', and 'Company templates' all listed; hundreds of templates mentioned by reviewers

lesson_templates.notes: [marketing] 'Customizable page layouts — create and save tailored page templates' explicitly listed

theme_customisation.notes: [marketing] 'Customizable styles', 'Global branding', 'Font options', 'Global brand control' all listed; on-brand themes are a core feature

white_label.notes: [marketing] Global branding and custom styles support on-brand courses; white-label of the platform itself not explicitly confirmed

custom_domain.notes: Not mentioned in any public source; URL releases go through Elucidat's hosting

conditional_navigation.notes: [marketing] 'Branching content — create personalized content paths based on learner choices or quiz results' explicitly listed; branching video also available

prerequisites.notes: Not explicitly named as a feature; branching/personalized paths exist but prerequisites as a gate not confirmed

personalised_paths.notes: [marketing] 'Personalized learning paths' and 'Content personalization — personalize each learner's experience using names, scores, and previous responses' explicitly listed

direct_video_upload.notes: [marketing] 'Audio and video embed — upload files directly or add media from YouTube and Brightcove' explicitly stated on All Features page

cdn_hosting.notes: [marketing] Secure hosting with 99.9% uptime, ISO 27001 certified providers; URL releases hosted by Elucidat

stock_media_library.notes: [marketing|docs] Pixabay integration for stock images explicitly listed on integrations page; 'Library of stock imagery' on All Features

in_product_image_editing.notes: Not mentioned; images are added from stock library or uploaded but editing tools not confirmed

subtitle_caption_support.notes: Not explicitly mentioned in public sources; WCAG compliance suggests some caption support but not confirmed

wcag_21_aa.notes: [marketing] 'WCAG 2.1 & Section 508' explicitly listed on All Features page; Author platform page states 'Meets WCAG 2.1 AA standards'

keyboard_navigation.notes: [marketing] 'Keyboard navigation — support learners who navigate using only the keyboard' explicitly listed on All Features

screen_reader_support.notes: [marketing] 'Screen reader compatibility' explicitly listed on All Features page

alt_text_support.notes: [marketing] 'Alternative text — add descriptive alternative text for images' explicitly listed on All Features page

shareable_link_no_lms.notes: [marketing] 'URL release' explicitly listed on All Features and Pricing; courses can be shared via URL without an LMS

password_protection.notes: Not explicitly mentioned in public sources for URL releases

sso_learner_access.notes: SSO listed for authors (SAML); learner-facing SSO not explicitly confirmed in public sources

embed_in_external_site.notes: [marketing] URL releases can be embedded; iframe embedding of third-party content into courses is supported but embedding courses into external sites not explicitly confirmed

rest_api.notes: [docs] Full REST API confirmed in help center: Account API, Projects API, Authors API, Projects and Releases API; access gated behind 'Scale' tier

webhooks.notes: [docs] Webhooks explicitly listed in help center API documentation; 'API: List subscriptions' article confirms webhook subscription management

zapier_make.notes: No mention of Zapier or Make integration in any public source

mcp_server.notes: No MCP server found in any public source

sso_author_access.notes: [marketing] 'Single sign-on (SSO) — allow authors to log in securely using SAML authentication' explicitly listed; included on Enterprise, add-on on lower tiers
